greeting: Hey there! 👋 I'm KhushAI, Khush's personal AI assistant. Ask me anything about his skills, projects, or experience!
fallback: Hmm, I'm not sure about that. Try asking about Khush's projects, skills, education, or how to get in touch!

aiSummary: Khusavant is a Computer Science student specializing in **AI & Machine Learning** who builds intelligent, production-ready applications. His core stack includes **Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch** for AI/ML, and **Node.js, React, and Flask** for full-stack development. From portfolio servers to service platforms, his projects demonstrate end-to-end engineering — from backend architecture to polished frontends. He brings **research-driven thinking** to real-world code.
idlePrompts: 🎯 Try asking about Khush's latest projects
💡 I can give you a quick summary of Khush's skills
🔍 Curious about a specific technology? Ask away!
🚀 Want to see what Khush has built? Say 'show projects'

intents.response: Hello! 👋 I'm KhushAI. I can tell you about Khush's projects, skills, education, and more. What would you like to know?

Khusavant (often called Khush) is a Computer Science student specializing in **Artificial Intelligence**. He builds intelligent web applications and AI-powered tools. He's passionate about solving real-world problems using machine learning, NLP, and computer vision. 🚀

🔥 Here are Khush's GitHub projects:
• **My Professional Server** — Node.js + Express portfolio server
• **Sulla Vista Project** — Responsive static website with HTML & CSS
• **GitMore** — GitHub-themed web project
• **Laundry Wallah** — Laundry service mini-project
• **JavaScript Pro** — Advanced JS concepts showcase
• **Project Coe** — Multi-page festive themed website
• **Node Simple Server** — Backend fundamentals with Node.js
• **React Assignment** — React SPA with Create React App

Want details on any specific project?

💻 **Languages:** Python, JavaScript, C++, SQL
🤖 **AI/ML:** TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, OpenCV
📝 **NLP:** spaCy, NLTK, Transformers, BERT
🌐 **Web:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Flask, FastAPI
🛠️ **Tools:** Git, Docker, Linux, VS Code
☁️ **Cloud:** AWS, Google Cloud, Firebase
🎓 Khush is pursuing a **B.Tech in Computer Science** with a specialization in **Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning**. He's focused on deep learning, NLP, and computer vision research.

📬 You can reach Khusavant at:
• **Email:** Khushavant1409@gmail.com
• **GitHub:** github.com/Khusavant
• **LinkedIn:** linkedin.com/in/khusavant-choudhary-546b48369

He's always open to exciting collaborations and opportunities!

💼 Khush has experience in:
• Building **AI/ML models** for real-world applications
• Developing **full-stack web apps** with AI integration
• Contributing to **open-source** AI projects
• **Hackathon** participation and mentoring

He's always looking for new challenges in the AI space!

🎮 When not coding, Khush enjoys:
• Exploring new AI research papers
• Building side projects and prototypes
• Gaming and digital art
• Contributing to tech communities

He believes the best learning happens through building!

📋 **Professional Summary:**

Khush is a CS student specializing in AI & ML who builds intelligent, production-ready applications. Core stack: **Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch** for AI/ML and **Node.js, React, Flask** for full-stack development. From portfolio servers to service platforms, his projects demonstrate end-to-end engineering. He brings research-driven thinking to real-world code.
